experience.title: OPS-SAT Space Lab Intern
bullets: Developed precise orbit determination algorithm using GNSS data
Supported experimenters running experiments on live satellites
Supported satellite design through CDR and IRR phases
Set up testbenches for OPS-SAT satellite systems
Reworked logistics and heightened workflow efficency
Created outreach material, helping reaching many new potential experimenters

experience.title: Summer Engineering Intern
bullets: Researched and simulated use of in-house satellites as ship SOS relays
Used GNU Radio, Python, and ML to simulate ship SOS and satellite movements

experience.title: CFO & Electronics Engineer

Designed PCB for BioSat; electronics design, soldering, cabling
Led electronics design for Sub-Orbital team in 2020
Built payload for Propulse NTNU — 1st place

experience.title: Electronics & Systems Engineer
experience.org: BEARS at TU Berlin — Exchange year
experience.desc: Electronics design, assembly, testing, and system design for Wobble 2 and Astrogrip satellite projects.

education.title: Integrated Master's in Electronic System Design and Innovation
education.desc: Specialisation in Space Systems. Topics: PCB design, IoT, GNSS, signal processing, satellite design, systems engineering. Year abroad at TU Berlin (2023–24).
